# Autogenerated schedule file.
# Copy this template file to Schedule.txt and make the necessary adjustments:
# - Add as many rows as you desire, each containing 8 columns.
# - The first column is time. See below for how to format time.
# - Other columns contain either a numeric value or dash: '-'. A dash copies the numeric value from the row before (i.e. after sorting rows by time) it. If there is no time before it, the copy wraps back to the end of the table.
# - You can add comments or documentation behind or between any rows.
# 
# The following time formats are supported (square braces are optional):
# - [w<startWeekNumber>:[w<endWeekNumber>:]]<days>[:hour][:minute][:second]   example without week numbers: mon,tue,wed,thu,fri:21:0
# - unix timestamp (GMT)              example: 1692688641
# 
# The field <days> is a comma separated list of days. Supported options are: mon, tue, wed, thu, fri, sat, sun. 
# <startWeekNumber> can be used to define the week number in which the rule becomes active.
# <endWeekNumber> can be used to define the week number in which the rule is no longer active. If no <endWeekNumber> then it equals <startWeekNumber>.
# A valid example rule including week numbers is:
# w2:w10:sat,sun:8:00  1  -  2
# The rule is active from week number 2 to week number 10, sets values 1 and 2 for columns 2 and 4 on weekend days at 8 am. It does not set a value for column 3.
# Note that (in the current implementation) week-specific rules overwrite the schedule of the full week. The default schedule is thus ignored in this case.
#
# time	 Comfort_living	Comfort_bedroom	Comfort_bathroom	Occupants_dayzone	Occupants_nightzone
# Comfort_living
mon,tue,wed,thu,fri,sat,sun:6:0:0	1	-	-	-	-	-	-
mon,tue,wed,thu,fri,sat,sun:23:0:0	0	-	-	-	-	-	-
# Comfort_bedroom
mon,tue,wed,thu,fri,sat,sun:20:0:0	-	1	-	-	-	-	-
mon,tue,wed,thu,fri,sat,sun:7:0:0	-	0	-	-	-	-	-
# Comfort_bathroom
mon,tue,wed,thu,fri,sat,sun:7:0:0	-	-	1	-	-	-	-
mon,tue,wed,thu,fri,sat,sun:9:0:0	-	-	0	-	-	-	-
# Occupants_dayzone
mon,tue,wed,thu,fri,sat,sun:7:0:0	-	-	-	1	-	-	-
mon,tue,wed,thu,fri,sat,sun:22:0:0	-	-	-	0	-	-	-
# Occupants_nightzone
mon,tue,wed,thu,fri,sat,sun:22:0:0	-	-	-	-	0	-	-
mon,tue,wed,thu,fri,sat,sun:7:0:0	-	-	-	-	0	-	-
# Occupants_158
mon,tue,wed,thu,fri,sat,sun:6:0:0	-	-	-	-	-	1	-
mon,tue,wed,thu,fri,sat,sun:23:0:0	-	-	-	-	-	0	-
# occupants_146
mon,tue,wed,thu,fri,sat,sun:6:0:0	-	-	-	-	-	-	1
mon,tue,wed,thu,fri,sat,sun:23:0:0	-	-	-	-	-	-	0
